title: fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/cgroups to v0.0.5
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/opencontainers/cgroups](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups) | `v0.0.4` -> `v0.0.5` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fcgroups/v0.0.5?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fcgroups/v0.0.4/v0.0.5?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/cgroups (github.com/opencontainers/cgroups)</summary>

### [`v0.0.5`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/releases/tag/v0.0.5)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/compare/v0.0.4...v0.0.5)

#### What's Changed

- Implement AddPid for cgroup managers by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​26](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/26)
- ci: bump golangci-lint to v2.4.x by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​29](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/29)
- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 4 to 5 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​27](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/27)
- build(deps): bump actions/setup-go from 5 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​40](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/40)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/compare/v0.0.4...v0.0.5>

</details>
